assert_return i8x16_all_true_with_v128.or v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> i32:1
assert_return i8x16_all_true_with_v128.or v128:0000000000000000000000000000ff00 v128:0000000000000000000000000000ff00 -> i32:0
assert_return i16x8_all_true_with_v128.or v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> i32:0
assert_return i16x8_all_true_with_v128.or v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> i32:1
assert_return i16x8_all_true_with_v128.or v128:000000000000000000000000ffff0000 v128:000000000000000000000000ffff0000 -> i32:0
assert_return i32x4_all_true_with_v128.or v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> i32:0
assert_return i32x4_all_true_with_v128.or v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> i32:1
assert_return i32x4_all_true_with_v128.or v128:0000000000000000ffffffff00000000 v128:0000000000000000ffffffff00000000 -> i32:0
assert_return i8x16_all_true_with_v128.xor v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> i32:0
assert_return i8x16_all_true_with_v128.xor v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> i32:0
assert_return i8x16_all_true_with_v128.xor v128:00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff v128:ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00ff00 -> i32:1
assert_return i16x8_all_true_with_v128.xor v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> i32:0
assert_return i16x8_all_true_with_v128.xor v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> i32:0
assert_return i16x8_all_true_with_v128.xor v128:0000ffff0000ffff0000ffff0000ffff v128:ffff0000ffff0000ffff0000ffff0000 -> i32:1
assert_return i32x4_all_true_with_v128.xor v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> i32:0
assert_return i32x4_all_true_with_v128.xor v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> i32:0
assert_return i32x4_all_true_with_v128.xor v128:00000000ffffffff00000000ffffffff v128:ffffffff00000000ffffffff00000000 -> i32:1
assert_return i8x16_all_true_with_v128.bitselect v128:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa v128:55555555555555555555555555555555 v128:55555555555555555555555555555555 -> i32:0
assert_return i8x16_all_true_with_v128.bitselect v128:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa v128:55555555555555555555555555555555 v128:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa -> i32:1
assert_return i16x8_all_true_with_v128.bitselect v128:aa00aa00aa00aa00aa00aa00aa00aa00 v128:55005500550055005500550055005500 v128:55005500550055005500550055005500 -> i32:0
assert_return i16x8_all_true_with_v128.bitselect v128:aa00aa00aa00aa00aa00aa00aa00aa00 v128:55005500550055005500550055005500 v128:aa00aa00aa00aa00aa00aa00aa00aa00 -> i32:1
assert_return i32x4_all_true_with_v128.bitselect v128:aa000000aa000000aa000000aa000000 v128:55000000550000005500000055000000 v128:55000000550000005500000055000000 -> i32:0
assert_return i32x4_all_true_with_v128.bitselect v128:aa000000aa000000aa000000aa000000 v128:55000000550000005500000055000000 v128:aa000000aa000000aa000000aa000000 -> i32:1
assert_invalid simd_boolean.2.wasm
